title: Manappuram Finance Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Manappuram Finance Global Group is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Manappuram Finance Global Group in Agra is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Manappuram Finance Global Group:
Manappuram Finance Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Manappuram Finance Global Group!
